headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights GoDaddy, Vipshop Holdings, MakeMyTrip and QuinStreet
summary: GoDaddy and peers ride strong digital demand as smartphone growth and online shifts fuel Internet delivery, despite cost pressures and macro risks.
